info.name: Orbit Backend API
info.description: Postman collection covering the Orbit backend REST API. Set `{{baseUrl}}` (default http://localhost:5000) and configure `{{accessToken}}` / `{{refreshToken}}` variables after logging in.

request.description: Authenticate with device-backed credentials. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.
Revoke the current access token by adding it to the blocklist.
Return the profile of the authenticated user.
List devices with pagination, sorting, and filters.
Submit device rows for bulk import (implementation stub).
Stream device data in CSV/JSON/Excel formats (implementation stub).
Assign multiple devices to the group.
List devices assigned to the group.
Queue or run a compliance evaluation (stub).
Execute or queue an operation across multiple devices.
Execute or queue an operation for a single device.
Retrieve a single request log entry.
Retrieve a single error log entry.
Return devices with hardware/software lifecycle state.
